	showCondition = 0,
	staticId = 40020,
	teleportToWorld = 0,
	timeShow = __rt_1,
	visibleEndTime = __rt_1,
	visibleStartTime = __rt_1,
	weatherShow = __rt_1
}
do
	local base = { __index = __default_values, __newindex = function() error( "Attempt to modify read-only table" ) end }
	for k, v in pairs( npc_DynamicNPC ) do
		setmetatable( v, base )
	end
	base.__metatable = false
end

npc_DynamicNPC.funcNew=function()end;

return npc_DynamicNPC
